comment: Continuous, story-driven advertisement VO for the 90s WorldCup26 spot. Themes: football as peace/fun/emotion, the mystery of who wins & who surprises, and building a community to enjoy the next month together. Lines are sized to fill each scene window so the narrator never stops; mux.mjs time-fits each line to its slot. `at` = start time in seconds.

lines.text: Football — it was always made for peace, for fun, and for pure, breathless emotion.
And once every four years, the whole planet feels it together. But who will win?
This time, you don't just wonder — you decide. Pick any three of the forty-eight nations chasing glory.
Will you trust the favorites, or gamble on a surprise? Lock them in before kickoff — from the first whistle, they score for you.
Because here's the magic: every goal is multiplied — by your team's odds, and by how far they dare to go.
So who will be the shock of the tournament? Back a fearless underdog, and watch the points explode — up to three times the glory.
Add your three together, and your score comes alive with every shot that finds the net.
And as the goals fly in, you rise up the live leaderboard, climbing alongside a whole community of fans, surging past your rivals toward number one, in real time.
And waiting at the very top? A prize pool of forty-eight thousand dollars, shared among the top ten.
And it only grows bigger and bigger, swelling with every new player who joins the fun this month.
But the real magic? It's the people you bring.
Bring your friends into the game, build your own little community, and every time they win, five percent drops straight into your pocket.
Or become an agent: stock up on tickets, and for every ten you sell, the next one's completely free — plus five percent of everything your players win, again and again.
The whole world is already playing. Join the community — let's have some fun, at WorldCup twenty-six dot world.
